OpenRouter.SystemPrompt:
Your task is to program the wind turbine schedule so that it produces the power required to start the power plant.

The power plant cannot run continuously because its battery does not allow it. Therefore, you must start its system only when it is truly needed. You can find the ideal timing by analyzing weather forecast results.

The APIs we provide also give you information about the turbine state and the power plant requirements. Preparing a report for each function takes time. We cannot tell you exactly how long each function call will take, but these calls are queued. Later, you only need to call the function that retrieves generated reports.

Each generated report can be retrieved only once. If you manage to configure everything within 40 seconds, we are saved and can move to the power production phase.
